items.title: Amazon’s 3-node eero 6+ mesh Wi-Fi system hits lowest price ahead of Prime Day at $195
items.summary: As part of its early Prime Day deals, Amazon is now offering the 3-pack eero 6+ mesh Wi-Fi 6 system for $194.99 shipped. The discount takes $105 off the usual price and drops the bundle back to the lowest price we first tracked for it last year, ahead of the holiday season. Amazon has also discounted the 1-pack, 2-pack, and 4-pack eero 6+ configurations to their best prices of the year, making this a great time to upgrade your home network with reliable whole-home Wi-Fi coverage.

In the middle of the pack is Jackery’s Explorer 2000 V2 Portable Power Station down at $689 shipped, after using the exclusive code 9TO580JAK at checkout. Normally going for $1,499 at full price, we’ve seen this model keeping down between $899 and $799 most of the time, though discounts in 2026 have gone as low as $749 and in 2025 we saw it go as low as $679 for Cyber Monday. With the deal here, you’re getting a 54% markdown for $810 savings to the second-lowest overall price we have tracked and the best rate we’ve seen in 2026. items.title: How much will Grand Theft Auto 6 cost?
items.summary: How much will Grand Theft Auto 6 cost? After years of waiting, a pair of high-profile delays, and a particularly cruel false start to pre-orders courtesy of Best Buy, it’s finally happening – Grand Theft Auto is officially going up for pre-order next week. And now everyone is wondering what the price of GTA 6 is going to be.

Space to stow cards is a unique perk offered by this unit.

How hacker group TeamPCP exploited the open source trust model and distribution method to compromise and inject malware into over 1,000 software packages  —  The threat group's remarkable success targeting open-source software was inevitable and fueled by the industry's decision to prioritize code shipping over security.
